# Aurora UI

> Copy-paste animated React components for Next.js (Tailwind, Radix, Framer Motion, WebGL).

Aurora UI is a source-first component library. Components are copied into your project — there is no opaque npm UI package.

## Primary resources for AI agents

- [Agent integration guide](docs/FOR_AI.md): step-by-step for LLMs — **read this first**
- [Component registry JSON](public/registry.json): machine-readable catalog with slugs, descriptions, raw source URLs, peer deps, import examples
- [CLI](cli/bin/aurora-ui.mjs): `list`, `info`, `add`, `init` — run with `--help`

## Quick commands

```bash
# List all components
npx --yes github:Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/cli/bin/aurora-ui.mjs list

# Add components to your app
npx --yes github:Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/cli/bin/aurora-ui.mjs add button card webgl-globe
```

## Live documentation

Clone the repo and run `npm run dev`, then open `/components` for previews, customization controls, and source tabs.

## Categories

Actions · Forms & Feedback · Cards & Surfaces · Overlays & Menus · Layout & Navigation · Typography & Counters · Backgrounds & Ambient Effects · 3D & WebGL

## Optional

- [README.md](README.md): human-oriented overview
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): Cursor workspace preferences
